description: AC5 (#142): the durable task_list, keyed by project_id, survives a Ralph window reset (fresh SessionId each window, same project) AND a process restart (a fresh FileSystemStorageProvider over the same root re-reads it). Window 1 writes under session A; window 2 (fresh session B, same project) reads what window 1 wrote; a brand-new provider over the same on-disk root reads the same bytes.

window_2.comment: A DIFFERENT session id than window 1 (mirrors SessionId::generate() per Ralph window). Reading the project namespace must return window 1's list verbatim — NOT an empty list.

cross_process.comment: A fresh FileSystemStorageProvider constructed over the SAME on-disk root (a new process) reads the SAME list under the SAME project namespace — proving crash-resume durability.
